_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Product Reveal Card
_meta.description:
This Product Reveal Card is a premium interactive e-commerce component that blends high-quality visuals with micro-interactions to increase conversion. It supports live hover reveals, animated star ratings, favorite toggling, discount badges, and a sliding overlay panel showcasing product details, features, and purchase actions.

Perfect for modern e-commerce stores, AI-powered marketplaces, or drop-in Shopify/Headless CMS product listings where sleek UX and conversion-driven design are a priority.
